n: Book 15, Chapter 10: The Broken Blade of Dúnachar

steps.t: Narmeleth is in her father's old room at Gath Forthnír in the northern reaches of Angmar. Narmeleth has told you to speak with Golodir and find what h…
Golodir is in his room in Gath Forthnír. Narmeleth has told you to speak with Golodir and find what has become of the broken blade of Dúnachar.
